old_claim.note: API Economy provides a capability that enables this technology without being the only possible path.

new_claim.note: OpenRTB bid request/response APIs provide the interoperable protocol surface for exchanges, supply sources, and bidders to trade impressions programmatically.

source_shape.source_locator: Introduction describes OpenRTB as an API specification for an open protocol supporting automated trading of digital media; the table of contents and object model define bid request and bid response API payloads.
source_shape.source_claim_summary: The specification documents API objects and protocol payloads used by exchanges, supply sources, and bidders in RTB transactions.
source_shape.source_support_rationale: Because the node is scoped to automated ad exchanges, the API specification directly supplies the interoperability mechanism for programmatic impression trading rather than merely broad internet context.

invariant_preserved_or_changed: Preserved: digital_advertising_exchanges keeps api_economy as the enabling protocol edge, now backed by OpenRTB API evidence.
would_reject_if: The node were narrowed away from RTB/programmatic exchanges to manual insertion-order advertising only.
A stronger source showed digital ad exchanges operated without bid request/response APIs or comparable programmatic interfaces.
The api_economy node were narrowed to post-2015 public developer-platform monetization only.
short_reason: OpenRTB documents the API mechanism for RTB exchanges.
